charity.focus: Food security, child hunger relief, poverty reduction, entrepreneurship support

wiki.extract: Chobani is an American food company specializing in strained yogurt. The company was founded in 2005 by Hamdi Ulukaya. Chobani sells thick, Greek yogurt with a higher protein content than traditional yogurt and is one of the main companies to popularize this style of yogurt in the US. The company has also expanded to non-dairy, plant-based products such as dairy-free vegan yogurt and oat milk. Chobani produces a variety of Greek yogurt products, oat drinks, and snacks. Chobani's yogurt's market share in the U.S. rose from less than 1% in 2007 to more than 20% in 2021, and is the top-selling Gr

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by forward-moving vehicle in nonroadway area
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was training other employees on inspecting finished goods on a pallet. When he knelt down behind the pallet and used his left hand to indicate what the failed inspection point was, a riding pallet jack entered the staging area and the employee's left little finger was crushed between the end of the fork and the pallet. The distal phalanx was medically amputated.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was working at the outfeed table and was reaching to retrieve a bottle when their little finger got caught in the conveyor resulting in an amputation.

sampleRecords.event_description: Compressed or pinched by shifting objects or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was assisting in the repositioning of an industrial freezer when their right ring fingertip became pinched between two freezers. The fingertip was amputated.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during maintenance, cleaning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was clearing a cup/foil jam on a filler when they were injured by the yogurt cup conveyor. The employee sustained lacerations to the left arm and left side and fractures to the left arm.

sampleRecords.event_description: Nonroadway collision with object other than vehicle, n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was operating a forklift with the mast in the air. The mast contacted an overhead cable (16 feet high), causing the front tires of the forklift to raise off of the pavement. The forklift came to rest unevenly and the employee's foot was crushed. The employee also suffered a hip abrasion.
